Transcrição Completa: Contextual Selling Going Deep VS Going Wide

[00:00] "There's a big difference between going deep and wide. Aka when you're contextually selling or when you're taking the shotgun approach."

[00:06] "I want to be very clear. The contextual approach where you go deep. You invest time into the individual. You invest researching if you can actually help them or not."

[00:16] "You look at things on their website to see if they have pixels even installed to use extensions on Chrome like Ghostastery which will help you see if they have Google remarketing tags installed to see all the other ways that they're trying to make money with little tracking codes that are on the back end."

[00:34] "Maybe they're not using Snapchat pixels yet or all kinds of stuff. My point being is that you need to leverage a little bit of time to understand how you can contextually sell to the people that you're pitching."

[00:46] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Sniper Approach vs Shotgun Approach"

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

VISUAL: Comparação visual entre abordagem de precisão (sniper) e abordagem ampla (shotgun), metáfora de armas para estratégias de vendas, conceito de alcance e precisão

[00:48] "The sniper approach is so much better than the shotgun approach because the sniper has more accuracy. Although the sniper is taking less shots, has less rounds in the cartridge, right? Has technically a longer range."

[01:02] "That means that the shotgun approach comparatively in this metaphor here is a very wide approach. It's a very uh blast approach, right? It's not accurate. It's not as precise in what it does. And on top of that, it has a shorter range."

[01:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Research Investment Strategy"

NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente

VISUAL: Processo de pesquisa profunda, investimento de tempo por prospect, análise individual detalhada, conceito de qualidade sobre quantidade

[01:20] "When you choose to do research on people, when you choose to take a little bit of time, that's just it's exactly what I said. It's going to take more time to do per pitch that you're making."

[01:30] "But remember, it's just all about statistical probability for what your response rate is going to be."

[01:36] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Perfect Cold Video Pitch Results"

NÚMEROS: 60 segundos (duração do vídeo pitch)

VISUAL: Exemplos de respostas positivas, taxa de resposta de pitches personalizados, processo de cold video pitch perfeito

[01:38] "Every time I've ever sent the perfect cold video pitcher, my staff has, we at least get a communication back that says, 'That was a very unique way. We appreciate that. Thank you.'"

[01:49] "And of course, we have very high odds of the people then getting on the phone with us for us to start the process of getting a deal done."

[01:56] "So, my point being, every perfect cold video pitch you do, every 60-second cold video pitch you do, this happens to me still to this day where I try to generalize the video or I or I'll test to see if general videos finally work yet, and they don't."

[02:12] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "General vs Personalized Video Performance"

NÚMEROS: 60 segundos (duração padrão)

VISUAL: Comparação de taxas de resposta: vídeos genéricos vs personalizados, baixa performance da abordagem ampla, conceito de lazy approach vs disciplined approach

[02:14] "They have such low odds of you getting a response, which would be the wide approach. Okay?"

[02:19] "Don't be lazy. Have some discipline here and do the deep sniper approach."

[02:25] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Deep Sniper Approach Process"

NÚMEROS: 10 out of 10 (recomendação)

VISUAL: Passo a passo do processo: pesquisa, identificação de como ajudar, criação de vídeos personalizados, duplicação através de equipe de vendas

[02:27] "Take the time to research. Take the time to figure out how you can actually help the people. Take videos where you're actually going through what you can do for the person and just keep doing it."

[02:38] "Duplicate yourself in a sales guys to incre uh increase the number of people that you're reaching out to."

[02:44] "And all in all, just remember deep versus wide, you want to go deep 10 out of 10, okay?"

[02:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Final Philosophy: Be a Sniper"

NÚMEROS: 10 out of 10 (escolha da abordagem deep)

VISUAL: Metáfora final sniper vs shotgun, conceito de determinação e disciplina, mentalidade de precisão sobre volume

[02:52] "You always want to have that ability and that willingness and that determination to do so. Be a sniper, not a shotgun shooter. Okay?"

[03:01] "I'll see you in the next video."

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

60 segundos: duração ideal do cold video pitch

10 out of 10: recomendação para escolher abordagem deep/sniper

Alta taxa de resposta: pitches personalizados garantem pelo menos comunicação de volta

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Contextual Selling (Deep Approach): Investir tempo pesquisando cada prospect individualmente

Research Process: Analisar website, verificar pixels instalados, usar extensões Chrome (Ghostastery), identificar Google remarketing tags

Cold Video Pitch: Vídeos de 60 segundos personalizados mostrando como você pode ajudar especificamente

Duplicate Strategy: Contratar equipe de vendas para escalar a abordagem personalizada

Sniper vs Shotgun: Precisão e qualidade sobre volume e generalização

ESTRUTURA:

Abordagem Sniper: Menos pitches, maior precisão, maior alcance, alta taxa de conversão

Abordagem Shotgun: Muitos pitches, baixa precisão, menor alcance, baixa taxa de conversão

Framework de Pesquisa: Website analysis → Pixel tracking → Identificação de oportunidades → Video personalizado

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Não foram mencionados valores monetários específicos

Foco em ROI qualitativo: maior taxa de resposta e conversão com abordagem deep

DURAÇÃO: ~3 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional/tutorial sobre estratégia de vendas
